My 2026 Goals :

  • Master Backend Development
  • Grab an internship / job offer
  • Build 10+ Projects
  • Start Freelancing
  • Gain Weight
  • Start reading books
  • Improve my spoken English

Day 26

  • Traveled to Noida for the interview.

Day 27

27 Jan | 2026

  • Today I had my interview.
  • I cleared the first round. They gave me three DSA questions, which I solved. After that, they gave me one more DSA question, and I solved that as well.
  • In the second round, they asked me Java questions for 40 minutes. I answered all of them. After that, they asked four questions from Spring Boot, and I was able to answer only two.
  • In the end, I was not selected. I will do more work.

Day 96

06 Apr | 2026

  • Went to Tech Mahindra for an interview. They initially rejected us, stating we were undergraduates, even though the requirement mentioned 0-2 years of experience.
  • But we insisted them to take interview.
  • They took a gd round and they said they will tell the result.
  • Also went to BSR role interview (Result Hold)
